flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Michigan Technological University fell 15% between 2006 and 2009 (25.7% → 21.9%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Michigan Technological University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.1k → $43.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Michigan Technological University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.0k → $19.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Michigan Technological University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
